title: ContextItem
description: A single item loaded into a Plandex plan's context: a file, directory tree, directory map, URL, note, image, or piped data.

type.description: Source type of the loaded context.

path.description: Path or URL of the source.

body.description: Loaded body (may be omitted in list views to save tokens).

tokensCached.description: Whether the body is cached against the model provider's prompt cache.
